dependencies: Water and sand for exploration and production
risks: Supply chain disruptions from economy-wide cost increases
Availability and cost of water and sand
Restrictions on water disposal due to seismic activity
Limited CO2 supply for EOR operations
Transportation capacity constraints in producing areas
Supply chain constraints from inflation and global logistics disruptions

regulatory_risks: New or amended laws and regulations on drilling, manufacturing or production processes including hydraulic fracturing
Changes in environmental regulations including climate change and GHG emissions
EPA methane emissions reduction program and methane waste emissions charge under IRA
BLM restrictions on federal lands leasing and increased royalty rates
Endangered Species Act restrictions (lesser prairie chicken, dunes sagebrush lizard, Rice's whale)
NEPA environmental review requirements for GHG emissions and climate change
State setback requirements and permitting restrictions in Colorado and New Mexico
EPA Toxic Substances Control Act regulations on chemicals including vinyl chloride
Potential changes to IRA tax incentives and federal support for low-carbon ventures
CERCLA and environmental remediation requirements including Diamond Alkali Superfund Site
Pillar Two global minimum tax implementation in multiple jurisdictions
Export and import restrictions on hydrocarbons and equipment
Changes in tax regulations including corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT)
Offshore leasing restrictions and permitting delays in Gulf of America
Water disposal regulations in response to seismic activity in Texas and New Mexico

sanction_risks: Russia-Ukraine war impacts on global oil markets
Conflicts in the Middle East affecting operations and commodity prices
Government sanctions restricting business in foreign jurisdictions
Potential US government restrictions on doing business in certain countries
Political instability in Algeria and Middle East operating regions
